package.name: arch_nav_flight_plan_executor
package.description: ROS 2 node that executes arch-nav flight plans dispatched dynamically over a ROS 2 action, one instance per UAV. Structurally modeled on arch_nav_json_flight_plan but with no dependency on it: missions are received at runtime via the ExecuteFlightPlan action instead of a static file parameter, and live telemetry/progress is published over ROS 2.
